title: Golden Roasted Syrian Lamb Flatbread
description: A quick-fix Syrian dish featuring roasted lamb and flatbread, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This recipe is egg-free and friendly for various diets.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the lamb shoulder with salt, black pepper, and sumac.
Heat the olive oil in a large oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Seal the lamb shoulder until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and roast the lamb for 20 minutes.
Meanwhile, toast the flatbread pieces by baking them in the oven for 5 minutes.
Spread pomegranate molasses over the toasted flatbread pieces.
Slice the roasted lamb shoulder into thin strips.
Assemble the flatbread by topping each piece with sliced lamb, chopped pistachios, and pitted dates.
